sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66772" key="metalli/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταλλ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n66772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be condemned to hard labour in mines,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.41.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
